product_overview: ModelSweep is a GUI-first evaluation workbench for local LLMs running on Ollama that lets users build test suites, run sequential evaluations across installed models, and visualize results with interactive dashboards and exports. The app runs locally and focuses on automated scoring, live pipeline visualizations, and repeatable benchmarking.
core_goals: Provide a local, GUI-first environment to evaluate installed LLMs (Ollama) without sending data off-machine
Enable users to create, configure, and run repeatable test suites across multiple models with automatic preload/unload to manage resources
Deliver multi-mode evaluations (standard prompts, tool calling, multi-turn conversation, adversarial) with layered auto-scoring and judge/human blending
Surface results via interactive dashboards, pipeline replays, and exportable artifacts for comparison and decision-making
Keep configuration and tooling accessible: model discovery, scoring weights, judge settings, and connectivity to Ollama

features.name: Global Navigation
features.description: A shared layout wrapper that provides consistent navigation between the main application modules so users can move quickly between dashboards, suites, models, playground, and settings.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Navigate between main modules -> Navigate to /suite -> Navigate to /results -> See active module content update
Navigate to / -> Navigate between main modules -> Navigate to /results -> See navigation error if the selected module fails to load

features.name: Suite Management
features.description: Create, edit, and run evaluation suites (starter suites included). Configure prompts, evaluation mode, and suite parameters, then start sequential runs across selected models.
user_flows: Navigate to /suite -> Select a starter suite -> Configure suite parameters -> Start run -> See live execution pipeline -> Wait for run to complete -> Navigate to /results -> See run results
Navigate to /suite -> Select a starter suite -> Configure suite parameters -> Start run -> See run error due to Ollama unreachable or models missing

features.name: Model Management
features.description: Discover and manage models installed in the local Ollama instance, select models for runs, and surface model capabilities (e.g., tool-calling support) to inform suite configuration.
user_flows: Navigate to /models -> See list of installed models -> Select models for a run -> See selected models reflected in run configuration
Navigate to /models -> See no models detected -> See message indicating Ollama may be offline

features.name: Playground (Interactive Model Testing)
features.description: Ad-hoc prompt testing against a chosen model with streaming responses to validate prompts, inspect behavior, or prototype suite prompts before running a full suite.
user_flows: Navigate to /playground -> Enter a prompt -> Select a model -> Submit prompt -> See streaming response in the playground
Navigate to /playground -> Enter a prompt -> Select a model -> Submit prompt -> See error if the model fails or Ollama returns an error

features.name: Live Execution & Pipeline Visualizations
features.description: Run-time pipeline that streams model responses, shows per-step status and node-level visuals (React Flow), and lets users watch execution in real time and later replay it from results.
user_flows: Navigate to /suite -> Start run -> See live execution pipeline with streaming nodes and status updates -> Navigate to /results -> Replay pipeline and see the same visualization
Start run -> See pipeline stall or timeout -> See error indicating a crash or run failure

features.name: Results Dashboard & Export
features.description: Interactive dashboards for completed runs including radar charts, heatmaps, score distributions, breach timelines, Elo timelines, and the ability to export results (JSON, CSV, PNG, PDF, Markdown).
user_flows: Navigate to /results -> Select a completed run -> See radar chart, heatmap, and score distributions -> Export results as JSON
Navigate to /results -> Select an incomplete run -> See partial data and disabled export option

features.name: Settings & Integrations
features.description: Application settings to configure Ollama connection, scoring weight blends, judge model configuration (local or cloud), and cloud provider API keys. Settings persist locally and control behavior of runs and scoring.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Update Ollama URL or scoring weights -> Save changes -> See confirmation that settings were saved
Navigate to /settings -> Configure a cloud judge provider without an API key -> Attempt to save -> See validation error preventing save

features.name: Community Browser
features.description: Browse community-shared suites and result cards to discover example suites and import compatible content into the local workspace for reuse or adaptation.
user_flows: Navigate to /community -> Browse shared suites and result cards -> Import a public suite into local suites -> See the imported suite available in /suite
Navigate to /community -> Attempt to import a shared suite -> See import error due to invalid format or incompatible version

features.name: Global Navigation
features.description: Standard layout wrapper with shared navigation
